title: 한국 영화 '파리의 인어', 아카데미 외국어영화상 수상
summary: 한국 영화 '파리의 인어'가 제96회 아카데미 시상식에서 외국어영화상을 수상했습니다.
content: The Korean film 'The Mermaid of Paris' won the Academy Award for Best Foreign Language Film. Director Bong Joon-ho dedicated the award to the entire Korean film industry. The cast and crew celebrated the historic achievement on stage. The film had already won numerous international awards previously. Korean cinema continues to gain recognition globally. Viewership increased significantly after the Oscars win. Streaming platforms have reported surge in demand. Cultural organizations praised the film's artistic merit. The success inspires future Korean filmmakers. International critics praised the film's universal themes. This marks the third Korean film to win this prestigious award.
